name: @pryzm/test-family-marketplace-publish
description: S59 deliverable: end-to-end test that exercises the marketplace publish flow — author keypair → packFamily(signingKey) → POST /api/v1/families → server-side schema/round-trip/signature/virus-scan validation → GET /api/v1/families list → GET /api/v1/families/:id detail → GET /api/v1/families/:id/download → unpackFamily(verifyingKey) round-trip. Mirrors the family-marketplace-publish CI gate row in `.replit`.
